reference: My two-year-old toddler has slept much of the past twenty-four hours. He complained at one time of a stomach ache and screamed out when picked up out of his bed at his normal morning wake time. He experienced diarrhea once during the day. I took him to the doctor, and his platelet count is normal. The doctor thinks he has a virus. As a parent, I am concerned that he is very lethargic and sleeping all the time. Do you have any advice?
text: My two-year-old toddler has slept much of the past 24 hours. He complained at one time of a stomachache and screamed out when picked up out of his bed at his normal morning wake time. He experienced diarrhea once during the day. I took him to the doctor, and his platelet count is normal. The doctor thinks he has a virus. As a parent, I am concerned that he is very lethargic and sleeping all the time. Do you have any advice?
